title: react_answer_spec_v1
description: react_minimal_v1 pre-retrieval answer specification. Produced from the raw user question (no classifier/translation upstream) and consumed by (a) the ReAct retrieval system prompt — required_slots tell the model what evidence to find and when to report missing_info — and (b) the generation prompt — answer_plan + governing_normative_class steer composition and authority weighting. Slot name/description are English (English corpus + English ReAct reasoning); the question may be Korean. Informs the model; not a deterministic gate.

governing_normative_class.description: The single authority rung that must anchor a defensible answer. binding=10 CFR/GDC/NSSC; advisory=RG/SRP/DSRS; review_record=SER/RAI; applicant_claim=FSAR/DCA; definitional=normative definition; mixed=two rungs co-anchor; unknown=too vague to place.

required_slots.description: Evidence pieces the answer must rest on. Model instantiates per query from the candidate prior.

name.description: Short snake_case English identifier (drives English-corpus retrieval).

description.description: English, one line: what to find and, where useful, in which source family.

required.description: true if the answer cannot be defended without this slot; false if it only strengthens it.

answer_plan.description: One or two sentences naming the composition strategy for this question: what to conclude, what to compare/separate, which authority distinctions to preserve. Composition guidance, not the answer. Language-neutral.
